trivia: Cessna's flagship stretches the Latitude concept into the super-midsize class: quieter, longer-legged and topped with big winglets. It is the biggest Citation yet built.
Its transatlantic-capable range produces long clean tracks that look great in a sightings list.
funFacts: Claimed the quietest cabin in its class at launch.
